name: crg-debug
description: Graph-driven parallel debugging and readiness campaigns for Claude Code. Builds a code-review-graph, fans out concern-disjoint discovery agents, adversarially verifies findings, and fixes confirmed bugs in TDD waves over file-disjoint sets (nothing committed) — or, via /crg-build, surveys an app's readiness gaps and builds the approved ones in dependency-ordered waves gated by exit codes and a headless browser, committing each validated wave locally.
